title: Figure 10 in Allopatric differentiation in the Marcusenius macrolepidotus species complex in southern and eastern Africa: the resurrection of M. pongolensis and M. angolensis, and the description of two new species (Mormyridae, Teleostei)
author: Kramer, Bernd
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 10. Analysis of genomic fingerprinting (ISSR PCR) in the M. macrolepidotus complex. Illustration as a UPGMA cladogram. Sample nos 9127 and 9129 from the Pongola River, type river for M. pongolensis (a third specimen's DNA was degraded too much for analysis).
steps_raw: Figure 10. Analysis of genomic fingerprinting (ISSR PCR) in the M. macrolepidotus complex. Illustration as a UPGMA cladogram. Sample nos 9127 and 9129 from the Pongola River, type river for M. pongolensis (a third specimen's DNA was degraded too much for analysis).
